title: Doge Client
description: This is a vanilla client type Client like lunar client which you can use on servers!
body:
Do you like clients like Lunar Client? Well I do! I like using Lunar client but I can't use any other mods. Its annoying, thats why I made Doge Client. Doge client is very similar to other clients like Lunar. It also has other features like the voice chat mod! You can also add any mods you want by opening the modpack folder! 

 

Doge client is mostly made for my server, Volcano Bay! Volcano Bay is an Earth towny server, but I wanted people to be able to use proximity chat. Sadly you cannot upload a modpack with optifine. Because of this Doge Client has Iris Shaders which works with any shaders you may use with optifine. It also has sodium for better frames! You may be wondering, "But what about my keystrokes?!?!?" Well doge client has KronHUD for that KronHUD is very similar to lunars keystrokes. It also has many other options for other hud changes. It is all configurable by pressing Right Shift like on other clients!
